title: Daewoo Argyle Collection, Toaster 2 Slice With Defrost, Reheat And Browning Control To Use At Your Convenience, While The Removable Crumb Tray Makes Cleaning Quick, Grey
features: FUNCTIONS – Toast smaller baked goods such as pancakes and breakfast muffins as our toaster self-centres to ensure they’re evenly toasted, while the high lift lever makes removing them easy and safe, simply lift up the lever so they pop up higher

SAFETY – Know when your toaster is toasting with the built in LED light that will illuminate when on. While the anti-jam function will shut off your toaster if bread or other baked goods get stuck to avoid burning and protect the longevity of your toaster

EASY TO CLEAN – Keep your worktop clean and tidy with our convenient removable crumb try. Simply slide out the side and empty into the bin for a mess-free space, while the cord storage underneath keeps your sides organised when the toaster is not in use

TOASTER CONTROLS – Whether your breads frozen or fresh our multiple toaster controls allow you to cancel, defrost and reheat your bread to perfection, while the 7 browning functions ensures you perfectly toast your bread to your preferred brownness

STYLISH DESIGN – Adds a unique and eye-catching element to your kitchen, our 2-slice toaster is designed with a textured zigzag pattern to enhance your aesthetic creating a cosier feel. Shop the collection with a range of colours to mix and match
PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy a comprehensive 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring your confidence in the longevity and quality of your Daewoo Argyle collection toaster

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 Slice toaster, Cancel option, Reheat option, Defrost option, 7 Browning settings, High lift lever, Self-centering, Anti-jam function, LED light, Removable crumb tray, Cord storage, Part of a collection for mix and match, Wide colour range
